positive: A highly stylized, intricate illustration of a cosmic sloth hanging peacefully from a glowing, oversized leaf. The sloth has a deep indigo fur, giving it a majestic, velvety silhouette. Surrounding the sloth is a jungle biome featuring glowing bioluminescent flora (large ferns, oversized mushrooms, and trumpet-like flowers) in emerald, sapphire, and neon teal accents. The composition must be centered, highly symmetrical, and rendered with bold, thick linework and strong, graphic contrast against a dark cosmic background. Use a vaporwave meets Art Nouveau aesthetic, emphasizing clean vectors and punchy, jewel-toned color blocking. The overall mood is magical, serene, and deeply stylized. Ideal for merchandise printing.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, lowres, realistic photo, photorealism, deep shadows, grayscale, muted colors, messy, busy background
